prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young Chinese male scholar from late Ming Dynasty, full-body standing pose centered on pure white background. Extremely attractive with delicate refined facial features, clear pale skin, and outstanding scholarly temperament. Deep penetrating eyes that convey intense focus and contemplation, slender elegant fingers, lean physique suggesting intellectual pursuits over physical labor. Wearing traditional qing-colored (blue-green) long robe in flowing Chinese scholar style, hair styled in traditional Ming Dynasty male fashion with topknot. His expression shows concentration and slight melancholy, embodying the mysterious atmosphere of famine-stricken northern China. Traditional Chinese ink painting style, black white and gray tones, profound artistic conception, ethereal brushwork quality. Full-body character design, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
